# spade

The goal of spade is to …

## Installation

You can install the development version of spade like so:

``` r

# FILL THIS IN! HOW CAN PEOPLE INSTALL YOUR DEV PACKAGE?
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r

library(spade)
## basic example code
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`makeCDFPlot()`](makeCDFPlot.md) : Plot the elicited cumulative
  probabilities
- [`plotfit()`](plotfit.md) : Plot the fitted density function for one
  or more experts
- [`run_app()`](run_app.md) : Run the Shiny app
